sections.paragraph:
Original: נוה נוה

Transliteration: nâveh nâvâh

Phonetic: naw-veh'

BDB Definition:

  1. abode, habitation, abode of shepherds or flocks, pasture (noun masculine)
    1. abode (of sheep)
    2. abode (of shepherds)
    3. meadow
    4. habitation
  2. dwelling, abiding (adjective)

Origin: from H5115

TWOT entry: 1322a,1322b,1322c

Part(s) of speech:
